subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the Single, the One, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that the Call may draw him unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله الفرد الواحد المهیمن القیوم لیجذبه الندآء الی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
